summary: Canonical script document contract for the uSCRIPT format. Defines the structure of executable markdown documents (-script.md). The Core runtime parses and dispatches ucode blocks; the TypeScript runtime renders story and presentation blocks.

block_types.ucode: Executable uCode commands dispatched by the Core runtime
block_types.story: UI workflow and interactive presentation blocks rendered by TypeScript
block_types.asset: Reusable renderable components (ASCII art, media references)

flow: Core parses frontmatter and declares permissions
Markdown body scanned for executable blocks
Story blocks rendered as interactive UI components
